---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: AbhishekVulla
---

## What you want

What would you like Clicky to do that it does not currently do?

## Why

What problem does this solve for you? A concrete scenario helps a lot ("I tried to do X, hit wall Y, would help if Clicky did Z").

## Alternatives you have considered

Workarounds you tried, other tools that do this, or related approaches you ruled out.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, prior art. Anything else that would help me understand the ask.
